svg.text: Best run AL-20260331-017 reached 1.3429 val_bpb. 117 scored runs are tracked here, with 32 kept and 85 discarded.
Latest run: AL-20260331-045 (discard) tested polynomial behavior may work better if the hidden path is normalized before squaring.
Read agent_lab/state.md for the live dashboard and agent_lab/tranches.md for the tranche map.
